title: panicum divisum
intro: Panicum divisum, also known as switch grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Panicum divisum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Panicum divisum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies.
